org.apache.dubbo.remoting

接口 Transporter

  • 所有已知子接口:
    Transporter
    所有已知实现类:
    GrizzlyTransporter, MinaTransporter, NettyTransporter, NettyTransporter

    @SPI(value="netty")
public interface Transporter
    Transporter. (SPI, Singleton, ThreadSafe)

    Transport Layer Client/Server

    另请参阅:
    Transporters

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 抽象方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      RemotingServer bind(URL url, ChannelHandler handler)
      Bind a server.
      Client connect(URL url, ChannelHandler handler)
      Connect to a server.

    • 方法详细资料

      • bind

        @Adaptive(value={"server","transporter"})
RemotingServer bind(URL url,
                                                              ChannelHandler handler)
                                                       throws RemotingException
        Bind a server.
        参数:
        url - server url
        handler -
        返回:
        server
        抛出:
        RemotingException
        另请参阅:
        Transporters.bind(URL, ChannelHandler...)

      • connect

        @Adaptive(value={"client","transporter"})
Client connect(URL url,
                                                         ChannelHandler handler)
                                                  throws RemotingException
        Connect to a server.
        参数:
        url - server url
        handler -
        返回:
        client
        抛出:
        RemotingException
        另请参阅:
        Transporters.connect(URL, ChannelHandler...)
